baseline.notes: Run 36b achieved 57.5% ball+GK co-visibility and showed a clean bimodal distance distribution at the 0.20 threshold. Precision gate working as designed but with diminishing returns: lost 3 TPs to cut 11 FPs, F1 flat. The remaining 28 GK FPs have either no GK visible or ball+GK both present at plausible proximity — 2D position alone can't distinguish real saves from hallucinations.

targets.notes: Trajectory MISSED override should reject shot_stop_diving events where ball passes through GK unchanged. Expected to cut 8–12 more FPs without affecting TPs (save trajectories show real direction/speed change). F1 ≥ 0.42 breakthrough target; ≥ 0.40 minimum improvement. Diag captures parry/catch/deflection signatures for later reel tagging.

notes: Run #37 — ball trajectory signature classifier. For GK events: analyze ball motion around contact moment. Strong MISSED signature (speed_ratio ≥ 0.8, angle < 30°) overrides proximity keeps. PARRY/CATCH/DEFLECTION signatures tagged in diag for future reel quality signals. Thresholds (90°, 30°, 0.3, 0.8) are physics-guess — Run #37 diag exposes real TP/FP distributions for #37b calibration.
